SEARCH
Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.specialrewards.votemilestones

Class VoteMilestone

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.specialrewards.votemilestones.VoteMilestone
public class VoteMilestone extends Object
Represents a single VoteMilestone entry. rewardPath: - Absolute path from SpecialRewards.yml root (e.g. "VoteMilestones.MyMilestone.Rewards", "Cumulative.20.Rewards", "FirstVote")

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • VoteMilestone

      public VoteMilestone(String id, boolean enabled, VoteMilestoneTotal total, AtMatcher atMatcher, Integer every, String rewardPath, VoteMilestoneGroupSelect groupSelect, String groupKey, VoteMilestoneLimit limit)
      Constructs a new VoteMilestone.
      Parameters:
      id - milestone id
      enabled - whether milestone is enabled
      total - total type to check
      atMatcher - matcher for specific values (may be null)
      every - interval for repeating milestone (may be null)
      rewardPath - path to rewards configuration
      groupSelect - group selection mode
      groupKey - group key
      limit - retrigger limit

  • Method Details

    • hasAtMatcherDebug

      public boolean hasAtMatcherDebug()
      Checks if this milestone has an at matcher for debugging.
      Returns:
      true if at matcher exists

    • getAtMatcherDebugString

      public String getAtMatcherDebugString(int maxValues)
      Gets debug string representation of the at matcher.
      Parameters:
      maxValues - maximum number of values to include
      Returns:
      debug string or "none"

    • matches

      public boolean matches(long newTotal)
      Checks if this milestone matches the given total.
      Parameters:
      newTotal - total to check against
      Returns:
      true if milestone matches
